orgName: Four Valleys Community School (FVCS) Ski and Sports Swap
notes: 501(c)(3), 30 years running community classes/events; swap is one program among several.

IMPORTANT: prior years' event pages reference 'My Consignment Manager (MyCM)' as their platform, not MySkiSwap. Their 2026 listing is on MySkiSwap, meaning they switched platforms recently. Worth confirming this in outreach, an org that just switched may be less receptive to switching again soon, or may be actively unhappy with their prior/current tool.
Contact Name: Dean M Gilbert. Personal gmail address, likely a volunteer organizer rather than an official org address.
